sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89577" key="proskeda/nnumi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προ-σκεδάννῡμι</orth>, <sense id="n89577.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">scatter before</tr_>:—<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Προσκεδαννύμενος</foreign>, title of a play by Alexis.</sense> </entryFree>
